description: Add Text variant to PromptKind and PromptAnswer enums in aipm wizard.rs
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs
Add `Text { placeholder: String, validate: bool }` variant to `PromptKind` enum after the Confirm variant
Add `Text(String)` variant to `PromptAnswer` enum after the Bool variant
Update the `format_steps` test helper to handle the new Text variant (serialize placeholder and validate fields)
Run `cargo build --workspace` to verify compilation
Run `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` to verify no lint violations
Open crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs
Add `pub fn validate_marketplace_name(input: &str) -> Result<(), String>` after the existing resolve_defaults function
Implement: empty string returns Ok(()), otherwise iterate chars and reject anything not lowercase ascii, digit, hyphen, @ or /
Add unit tests: accepts 'my-plugins', '@org/plugins', '', '123abc'
Add unit tests: rejects 'MyPlugins', 'my plugins', 'my_plugins'
Run `cargo test --workspace` to verify tests pass
Run `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`

description: Update workspace_prompt_steps() to accept flag_name and add marketplace name prompt
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs
Add `flag_name: Option<&str>` parameter to `workspace_prompt_steps()` signature
After the setup-mode prompt and before the starter-plugin prompt, add conditional marketplace name Text prompt
Condition: `marketplace_possible && flag_name.is_none()`
Use placeholder 'local-repo-plugins', validate: true, help text 'Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, or press Enter for default'
Update all existing test calls to workspace_prompt_steps to pass the new parameter (None for backward compat)
Add new snapshot tests: no flags shows name prompt as step 2, --name flag omits name prompt, --workspace only omits name prompt
Run `cargo test --workspace` and update insta snapshots with `cargo insta review`

description: Update resolve_workspace_answers() to return marketplace name as 4-tuple
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs
Add `flag_name: Option<&str>` parameter to `resolve_workspace_answers()` signature
Change return type from `(bool, bool, bool)` to `(bool, bool, bool, String)`
After resolving setup mode and before resolving no_starter, add marketplace name resolution logic
If flag_name is Some, use it; else if marketplace_possible, read PromptAnswer::Text from answers (empty -> default); else use default
Increment idx after consuming the name answer
Update resolve_defaults() to accept `name: Option<&str>` and return 4-tuple with marketplace_name
Update all existing test calls to pass the new flag_name parameter and destructure 4-tuples
Add snapshot tests: custom name text input, empty text input -> default name
Add unit tests for resolve_defaults with and without name flag
Run `cargo test --workspace` and update insta snapshots

description: Update wizard_tty.rs to handle Text prompts and pass marketplace name
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard_tty.rs
Update `resolve()` signature: add `flag_name: Option<String>` parameter, change return to `Result<(bool, bool, bool, String), ...>`
Update import list to include `validate_marketplace_name` and `PromptAnswer::Text`
Pass `flag_name.as_deref()` to `workspace_prompt_steps()` and `resolve_workspace_answers()`
Update non-interactive path to call `resolve_defaults(workspace, marketplace, no_starter, flag_name.as_deref())`
Add `PromptKind::Text` match arm to `execute_prompts()`: use `inquire::Text::new()` with placeholder, help, and optional validator
The validator should call `validate_marketplace_name()` and convert to `inquire::validator::Validation`
Run `cargo build --workspace` to verify compilation

description: Add --name CLI flag to Commands::Init and update main.rs dispatch
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/main.rs
Add `name: Option<String>` field with `#[arg(long)]` to the Init variant, before the dir field
Add doc comment: '/// Custom marketplace name (default: "local-repo-plugins").'
Update the match arm destructure to include `name`
Pass `name` as third argument to `wizard_tty::resolve()`
Destructure the 4-tuple return: `(do_workspace, do_marketplace, do_no_starter, marketplace_name)`
Add `marketplace_name: &marketplace_name` to the Options struct construction
Update MarketplaceCreated output to include the marketplace name in the message
Run `cargo build --workspace` to verify compilation

description: Add marketplace_name field to Options struct in workspace_init/mod.rs
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs
Add `pub marketplace_name: &'a str` field to `Options<'a>` struct with doc comment
Update `scaffold_marketplace()` signature to accept `marketplace_name: &str` parameter
Update the call to `generate_marketplace_json()` to pass marketplace_name
Update the call site in `init()` to pass `opts.marketplace_name` to scaffold_marketplace and adaptor.apply
Update all test Options constructions in the test module to include `marketplace_name: "local-repo-plugins"`
Run `cargo build --workspace` to verify compilation

description: Add marketplace_name parameter to ToolAdaptor trait apply() method
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs
Add `marketplace_name: &str` parameter to the `apply()` method in the `ToolAdaptor` trait definition, between no_starter and fs
Update the doc comment to mention the marketplace_name parameter
Update the call site in `init()` to pass `opts.marketplace_name` when calling `adaptor.apply()`
Run `cargo build --workspace` — expect compile error in claude.rs adaptor (will be fixed in next feature)

description: Parameterize generate_marketplace_json() to accept marketplace name
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs
Change `generate_marketplace_json(no_starter: bool)` signature to `generate_marketplace_json(marketplace_name: &str, no_starter: bool)`
Replace the two hardcoded string-literal JSON templates with serde_json::Map construction
Insert 'name', 'owner', 'metadata', 'plugins' keys programmatically using the marketplace_name parameter
Use serde_json::to_string_pretty() with unwrap_or_default() for serialization (never .unwrap())
Append trailing newline to output
Update the call in scaffold_marketplace() to pass the marketplace_name
Update existing tests: marketplace_json_with_starter_is_valid, marketplace_json_no_starter_has_empty_plugins to pass name parameter
Add new test: custom name produces JSON with that name
Run `cargo test --workspace`

description: Parameterize Claude Code adaptor to use marketplace_name parameter
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/adaptors/claude.rs
Update `apply()` signature to include `marketplace_name: &str` parameter
Replace fresh-file string templates with serde_json::Map construction using marketplace_name
Build extraKnownMarketplaces with marketplace_name as key and the source entry as value
Build enabledPlugins with format!('starter-aipm-plugin@{marketplace_name}') as key when no_starter is false
Use serde_json::to_string_pretty().unwrap_or_default() for serialization
Update merge_claude_settings() signature to accept marketplace_name: &str
Replace all 6 hardcoded 'local-repo-plugins' references in merge_claude_settings with the parameter
Build starter_key with format!('starter-aipm-plugin@{marketplace_name}')
Update all existing tests to pass marketplace_name parameter
Add new tests: fresh settings with custom name, merge with custom name
Run `cargo test --workspace`

description: Update scaffold script to read marketplace name from marketplace.json at runtime
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs
Locate generate_scaffold_script() function
Find the enabledPlugins key construction line: `const pluginKey = `${name}@local-repo-plugins`;`
Replace with: `const pluginKey = `${name}@${marketplace.name}`;`
Keep the fallback marketplace object with 'local-repo-plugins' as safety net (no change to fallback)
Update scaffold_script_enables_in_settings test to check for 'marketplace.name' instead of '@local-repo-plugins'
Update scaffold_script_marketplace_name_matches_generator cross-consistency test
Run `cargo test --workspace` and update insta snapshots

description: Update integration tests in workspace_init/mod.rs for marketplace name
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs test module
Update init_marketplace_creates_marketplace_json to verify custom name in marketplace.json
Update init_no_starter_creates_marketplace_json_with_empty_plugins to pass marketplace_name
Update init_no_starter_still_configures_tools to verify custom name in settings.json
Update init_marketplace_with_preconfigured_claude_settings to use custom name
Add new integration test: init() with custom name produces marketplace.json with that name and settings.json with that name
Add new integration test: init() with default name produces unchanged behavior
Run `cargo test --workspace`

description: Update BDD feature scenarios for marketplace name
steps: Open tests/features/manifest/workspace-init.feature
Verify existing scenarios that assert 'the marketplace.json name is "local-repo-plugins"' still pass with default
Add new scenario: 'aipm init --marketplace --name "my-plugins"' and assert marketplace.json name is 'my-plugins'
Check if BDD step definitions in crates/libaipm/tests/bdd.rs need updates for the new --name flag
Run `cargo test --workspace` to verify BDD scenarios pass

description: Update E2E tests for marketplace name customization
steps: Open crates/aipm/tests/init_e2e.rs
Update existing E2E tests that parse marketplace.json to account for the new Options field
Add new E2E test: `aipm init --marketplace --name "custom-mkt" -y` produces marketplace.json with name 'custom-mkt'
Add new E2E test: `aipm init --marketplace -y` produces marketplace.json with default name 'local-repo-plugins'
Run `cargo test --workspace` to verify E2E tests pass

description: Regenerate all insta snapshots and verify full test suite
steps: Run `cargo insta test --workspace` to identify all snapshot changes
Run `cargo insta review` to accept updated snapshots in crates/aipm/src/snapshots/
Run `cargo insta review` to accept updated snapshots in crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/snapshots/
Run `cargo test --workspace` to verify all tests pass
Run `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` to verify no lint violations
Run `cargo fmt --check` to verify formatting
Run the coverage commands from CLAUDE.md to verify >= 89% branch coverage
